one_line: Implemented Hartigan's dip test (vetted diptest v0.11 / AS 217, gated by a Gaussian sanity test that caught a buggy hand-rolled version) and ran it on real per-episode rewards (A1 glm-5p2 126/cond, A2 deepseek-v4-pro 150/cond, rex/runs): weak policies are statistically BIMODAL (zero_shot/best_of_n/retry/rex_no_oracle D~0.12-0.16, p<1e-4 in both models) while REx is UNIMODAL (D=0.033 p=0.42 / D=0.025 p=0.78) because it collapses the failure mode to a ~90%-at-reward>=0.9 spike.
